prerequisites.label: Skill 05 - GHL Setup
prerequisites.satisfy: Install Skill 05 (GHL Setup) first. It is in the same onboarding package; re-run the installer or install Skill 05 on its own.

prerequisites.label: Skill 10 - GitHub Setup
prerequisites.satisfy: Install Skill 10 (GitHub Setup) first. It is in the same onboarding package; re-run the installer or install Skill 10 on its own.

prerequisites.label: Skill 19 - Cloudflare Setup
prerequisites.satisfy: Install Skill 19 (Cloudflare Setup) first. It is in the same onboarding package; re-run the installer or install Skill 19 on its own.

prerequisites.label: Skill 29 - GHL Convert and Flow
prerequisites.satisfy: Install Skill 29 (GHL Convert and Flow) first; it is in the same onboarding package. Re-run the installer or install Skill 29 on its own, then re-check prerequisites.

prerequisites.label: Cloudflare API Token
prerequisites.satisfy: Add CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN=<your token> to ~/.openclaw/secrets/.env (chmod 600), then: openclaw config set env.vars.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN "$CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN". Create the token at dash.cloudflare.com > My Profile > API Tokens.
